title: Henry: Portrait of a Serial Killer, Part 2
original_title: Henry: Portrait of a Serial Killer, Part 2
overview: Henry has wandered into a small town looking for work and a place to stay. He gets a job delivering and cleaning porto-potties and moves in with a co-worker until he gets his feet off of the ground. Henry and his new friend soon start to kill.
